title: myosotis glauca
intro: Myosotis glauca, also known as Alpine forget-me-not or glaucous forget-me-not, is a small, delicate perennial plant that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of M. glauca include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of M. glauca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
